title: Best Buy wants to be the hub for AI-powered hardware like glasses, laptops
description: The tech retailer is looking for growth, as its revenue was essentially flat this past fiscal year from the year before, at almost $42 billion.
summary_ko: 베스트바이가 AI 기반 하드웨어 허브로 성장하려 하고 있으나 전년 대비 매출이 거의 정체된 상황입니다. 회사는 AI 안경, 노트북 등 AI 기반 제품군을 통해 새로운 성장동력을 찾고 있습니다. 약 420억 달러 매출 규모에서 혁신적 변화가 필요한 시점입니다.
summary_en: Best Buy is positioning itself as a hub for AI-powered hardware amid flat revenue growth. The tech retailer is seeking new growth opportunities through AI devices like glasses and laptops. With revenue stagnant at around $42 billion, the company needs innovative strategies to drive growth.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 전통 리테일러도 AI 하드웨어에 주목하는 점을 참고해 AI 기반 제품 개발과 차별화된 고객 경험 제공에 투자해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should note that even traditional retailers are pivoting to AI hardware, indicating the need to invest in AI-powered products and differentiated customer experiences.
key_points: Best Buy targeting AI hardware as growth driver
Revenue flat at $42 billion year-over-year
Focus on AI glasses and laptops as key categories

title: Future of TV Briefing: OpenX adds attention targeting for CTV ads backed by TVision
description: This week’s Future of TV Briefing looks at a new ad targeting option for CTV advertisers wary of people staring at their phones while an ad airs.
summary_ko: OpenX가 TVision과 협력해 CTV 광고에 어텐션 타겟팅 기능을 추가했습니다. 이는 광고 시청 중 스마트폰을 보는 시청자들을 우려하는 광고주들을 위한 새로운 타겟팅 옵션입니다. CTV 광고의 실제 시청 집중도를 측정하여 광고 효율성을 높이려는 시도입니다.
summary_en: OpenX has introduced attention targeting for CTV ads in partnership with TVision. This new targeting option addresses advertiser concerns about viewers looking at their phones during ad breaks. The solution aims to improve ad effectiveness by measuring actual viewer attention on CTV platforms.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 CTV 광고 집행 시 어텐션 메트릭을 활용해 실제 시청 집중도를 측정하고 광고 ROI를 개선할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage attention metrics in CTV advertising to measure real viewer engagement and improve advertising ROI.
key_points: OpenX launches attention targeting for CTV ads
Partnership with TVision for measurement
Addresses multi-screen attention challenges

title: AI surfacing is messy: Data shows publisher visibility and traffic often misalign
description: Reports tracking publishers in AI chatbots abound but conflicting rankings and uneven referral traffic reveal the murkiness of AI visibility.
summary_ko: AI 챗봇에서의 퍼블리셔 노출과 트래픽 간의 불일치가 심각한 문제로 대두되고 있습니다. AI 가시성을 추적하는 리포트들이 상충되는 순위를 보여주며 실제 트래픽 유입과 일치하지 않는 현상이 발생하고 있습니다. AI 검색 환경에서의 콘텐츠 노출 측정이 여전히 불명확한 상태입니다.
summary_en: Publisher visibility in AI chatbots often misaligns with actual traffic referrals, creating measurement challenges. Conflicting rankings in AI tracking reports reveal the complexity of measuring AI visibility effectively. The murkiness of AI surfacing makes it difficult for publishers to understand their true performance.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 검색 최적화 전략 수립 시 단순 노출보다는 실제 트래픽과 전환율을 중심으로 성과를 측정해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should focus on actual traffic and conversion metrics rather than just visibility when developing AI search optimization strategies.
key_points: AI chatbot visibility doesn't guarantee traffic
Conflicting AI tracking reports create confusion
Measurement challenges in AI search environments

title: The in-house entertainment studio is having its social media team moment
description: Brands are becoming media companies (again). This time they mean it.
summary_ko: 브랜드들이 인하우스 엔터테인먼트 스튜디오를 구축하며 미디어 회사로 변모하는 트렌드가 나타나고 있습니다. 이는 소셜미디어 팀의 순간과 유사한 패턴을 보이며, 브랜드들이 진정성 있게 미디어 제작에 나서고 있습니다. 콘텐츠 제작을 통한 브랜드 차별화 전략이 주목받고 있습니다.
summary_en: Brands are establishing in-house entertainment studios, transforming into media companies in a trend similar to the social media team boom. This movement represents a genuine commitment to content creation and media production. Brands are using entertainment content as a differentiation strategy in the market.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 인하우스 콘텐츠 제작 역량을 구축해 고객과의 직접적 소통 채널을 확보하고 브랜드 스토리텔링을 강화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should build in-house content production capabilities to establish direct customer communication channels and strengthen brand storytelling.
key_points: Brands becoming media companies through in-house studios
Similar pattern to social media team adoption
Entertainment content as brand differentiation

title: Today's NYT Mini Crossword Answers for Wednesday, March 11
description: Here are the answers for The New York Times Mini Crossword for March 11.
summary_ko: 뉴욕타임스 미니 크로스워드 퍼즐의 3월 11일 정답을 제공하는 기사입니다. 게임 관련 콘텐츠로 일반적인 엔터테인먼트 정보를 다루고 있습니다. D2C 비즈니스나 AI 상거래와 직접적인 연관성은 없는 콘텐츠입니다.
summary_en: This article provides answers for The New York Times Mini Crossword puzzle for March 11. It covers general entertainment content related to gaming and puzzles. The content has no direct relevance to D2C business or AI commerce applications.
so_what_ko: D2C 관점에서 직접적인 시사점이 없는 일반 엔터테인먼트 콘텐츠입니다.
so_what_en: No direct implications for D2C business as this is general entertainment content.
key_points: NYT Mini Crossword answers for March 11
Gaming and puzzle entertainment content
No business or commerce relevance

title: Time-Sensitive Offers in Google Ads
description:
A date-specific ad message does not automatically show, but workarounds can increase its chances.
The post Time-Sensitive Offers in Google Ads appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.
summary_ko: Google Ads에서 기간 한정 오퍼 메시지는 자동으로 표시되지 않지만 우회 방법을 통해 노출 가능성을 높일 수 있다. 날짜별 광고 메시지 운영을 위한 실용적 접근법을 제시한다. 시간 민감형 프로모션의 광고 효율성 개선 방안을 다룬다.
summary_en: Date-specific ad messages in Google Ads don't automatically display, but workarounds can increase their visibility chances. The article presents practical approaches for operating time-sensitive promotional campaigns. It covers methods to improve advertising efficiency for time-sensitive offers.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 플래시 세일이나 기간 한정 프로모션의 광고 노출을 최적화하여 전환율을 높일 수 있다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can optimize ad exposure for flash sales and limited-time promotions to increase conversion rates.
key_points: Time-sensitive ad messages require manual optimization in Google Ads
Workaround strategies can improve promotional campaign visibility
Date-specific offers need strategic planning for effective display

title: Fabletics expands into denim to ride casualization trend
description: CEO Adam Goldenberg told Retail Dive in January that shoppers expect athletic brands to offer casual products as apparel trends shift.
summary_ko: Fabletics가 캐주얼화 트렌드에 맞춰 데님 라인으로 사업을 확장한다. CEO Adam Goldenberg는 운동복 브랜드가 캐주얼 제품을 제공해야 한다고 언급했다. 의류 트렌드 변화에 따른 소비자 기대 충족을 위한 전략적 확장이다.
summary_en: Fabletics expands into denim to align with the casualization trend in apparel. CEO Adam Goldenberg stated that shoppers expect athletic brands to offer casual products. This strategic expansion responds to shifting consumer expectations in clothing trends.
so_what_ko: D2C 의류 브랜드는 소비자 라이프스타일 변화를 반영한 제품군 확장으로 시장 점유율을 늘릴 수 있다.
so_what_en: D2C apparel brands can increase market share by expanding product lines that reflect changing consumer lifestyles.
key_points: Athletic brands expanding into casual wear to meet consumer expectations
Casualization trend driving product line diversification
Strategic expansion responding to apparel market shifts

title: Kohl’s rules out major store closures despite disappointing Q4
description: The struggling department store is simplifying promotions and adding value-priced merchandise to appeal to its lower- to middle-income customer. But is it going far enough?
summary_ko: Kohl's가 실망스러운 4분기 실적에도 불구하고 대규모 매장 폐점을 배제한다고 발표했다. 중저소득층 고객을 위해 프로모션을 단순화하고 가성비 상품을 추가하는 전략을 추진한다. 하지만 이러한 변화가 충분한지에 대한 의문이 제기된다.
summary_en: Kohl's rules out major store closures despite disappointing Q4 performance. The company is simplifying promotions and adding value-priced merchandise to appeal to lower- to middle-income customers. Questions remain whether these changes go far enough to address challenges.
so_what_ko: 기존 리테일러의 가격 경쟁력 강화 전략은 D2C 브랜드에게 차별화된 가치 제안의 중요성을 시사한다.
so_what_en: Traditional retailers' price competitiveness strategies highlight the importance of differentiated value propositions for D2C brands.
key_points: Department store avoiding major closures despite poor performance
Strategy focuses on promotion simplification and value pricing
Targeting lower- to middle-income customer segments

title: The Brand House Collective COO exits after less than a year
description: James Schisler resigned from his role while the company is in the process of being acquired by Bed Bath & Beyond Inc.
summary_ko: The Brand House Collective의 COO James Schisler가 1년 미만 재직 후 사임했다. 회사는 현재 Bed Bath & Beyond Inc.에 인수되는 과정에 있다. 인수 진행 중 핵심 임원의 이탈이 발생한 상황이다.
summary_en: The Brand House Collective COO James Schisler resigned after less than a year in the role. The company is currently in the process of being acquired by Bed Bath & Beyond Inc. This executive departure occurs during the ongoing acquisition process.
so_what_ko: M&A 과정에서 핵심 인력 이탈은 불안정성을 나타내며, D2C 기업은 조직 안정성 확보가 중요하다.
so_what_en: Key personnel departures during M&A processes indicate instability, emphasizing the importance of organizational stability for D2C companies.
key_points: COO departure after less than one year tenure
Company undergoing acquisition by Bed Bath & Beyond
Executive turnover during acquisition process

title: Princess Polly plots next wave of US store openings
description: The apparel brand will open eight stores across Florida, Texas, Minnesota, Tennessee and North Carolina throughout this year and into 2027.
summary_ko: Princess Polly가 미국 내 다음 단계 매장 오픈을 계획하고 있다. 플로리다, 텍사스, 미네소타, 테네시, 노스캐롤라이나에 8개 매장을 올해부터 2027년까지 개점할 예정이다. 의류 브랜드의 적극적인 미국 시장 확장 전략이다.
summary_en: Princess Polly plans the next wave of US store openings across multiple states. The apparel brand will open eight stores in Florida, Texas, Minnesota, Tennessee, and North Carolina from this year through 2027. This represents an aggressive expansion strategy in the US market.
so_what_ko: 해외 D2C 브랜드의 오프라인 매장 확장은 옴니채널 전략의 중요성과 물리적 접점의 가치를 보여준다.
so_what_en: International D2C brands' offline store expansion demonstrates the importance of omnichannel strategy and physical touchpoint value.
key_points: Eight new store openings planned across five US states
Expansion timeline extends from 2026 through 2027
International apparel brand's US market penetration strategy

title: Petal & Pup eyes launch with Dillard’s, Von Maur
description: The fashion brand has a successful partnership with Nordstrom and is ready for additional growth.
summary_ko: 패션 브랜드 Petal & Pup이 Dillard's와 Von Maur와 새로운 파트너십을 체결했다고 발표했습니다. 이미 Nordstrom과 성공적인 파트너십을 보유하고 있는 이 브랜드는 추가적인 성장을 준비하고 있습니다. 이번 확장을 통해 더 많은 리테일 채널에서의 접점을 늘리려는 전략으로 보입니다.
summary_en: Fashion brand Petal & Pup announced new partnerships with department stores Dillard's and Von Maur. The brand already has a successful partnership with Nordstrom and is positioning for additional growth. This expansion represents a strategy to increase retail touchpoints across multiple channels.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드가 성장하면서 주요 백화점들과의 파트너십 확장이 중요한 성장 전략이 되고 있음을 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: Shows how D2C brands can scale by expanding partnerships with major department stores as a key growth strategy.
key_points: Petal & Pup expanding retail partnerships beyond Nordstrom
New partnerships with Dillard's and Von Maur announced
Brand positioning for additional growth through multi-channel strategy

title: Klaviyo and Shopify announce deeper product integration
description:
Customer relationship management (CRM) platform Klaviyo announced deepened product integration with ecommerce software provider Shopify. Klaviyo said the “expanded interoperability helps enterprises better unify customer data across regions.” In doing so, it said, the integration helps to deliver “consistent, localized experiences worldwide.” Klaviyo framed the integration around merchants expanding worldwide sales and a February 2025 […]
The post Klaviyo and Shopify announce deeper product integration appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: CRM 플랫폼 Klaviyo가 Shopify와 더 깊은 제품 통합을 발표했습니다. 이번 통합은 기업들이 지역 간 고객 데이터를 더 잘 통합하고 전 세계적으로 일관된 현지화 경험을 제공하는데 도움을 줍니다. 전 세계 판매 확장을 위한 상인들의 니즈에 맞춘 통합으로 평가됩니다.
summary_en: CRM platform Klaviyo announced deeper product integration with ecommerce software provider Shopify. The expanded interoperability helps enterprises better unify customer data across regions and deliver consistent, localized experiences worldwide. The integration is framed around merchants expanding global sales operations.
so_what_ko: 글로벌 D2C 확장 시 CRM과 이커머스 플랫폼 간의 데이터 통합이 일관된 고객 경험 제공의 핵심이 되고 있습니다.
so_what_en: Data integration between CRM and ecommerce platforms becomes crucial for delivering consistent customer experiences during global D2C expansion.
key_points: Klaviyo and Shopify announce deeper product integration
Focus on unifying customer data across regions
Enables consistent, localized experiences for global merchants

title: Kohl’s leans further into digital sales, Q4 revenue drops
description:
With ecommerce accounting for more than a third of total sales during Kohl’s Corp.’s fiscal Q4 2025, executives shared how the retailer is upgrading its digital infrastructure to improve profit margins, search and discoverability. CEO Michael Bender told analysts on the retailer’s quarterly earnings call that Kohl’s has “an opportunity to modernize” its capabilities and […]
The post Kohl’s leans further into digital sales, Q4 revenue drops appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: Kohl's가 4분기 매출이 감소했음에도 불구하고 디지털 판매에 더욱 집중하고 있습니다. 이커머스가 전체 매출의 3분의 1 이상을 차지하는 가운데, 수익 마진과 검색 기능 개선을 위해 디지털 인프라를 업그레이드하고 있습니다. CEO는 회사의 역량 현대화 기회가 있다고 언급했습니다.
summary_en: Kohl's is leaning further into digital sales despite Q4 revenue drops, with ecommerce accounting for over one-third of total sales. The retailer is upgrading its digital infrastructure to improve profit margins, search functionality, and discoverability. CEO mentioned opportunities to modernize the company's capabilities.
so_what_ko: 전통 리테일러들도 디지털 전환이 생존의 핵심이 되면서, 검색과 발견성 개선을 통한 수익성 확보에 집중하고 있습니다.
so_what_en: Traditional retailers are focusing on profitability through improved search and discoverability as digital transformation becomes essential for survival.
key_points: Ecommerce represents over one-third of Kohl's total sales
Company upgrading digital infrastructure for better margins
Focus on improving search and product discoverability

title: Agentic commerce faces reality check in B2B ecommerce
description:
The early excitement surrounding agentic commerce — the idea that artificial intelligence (AI) agents can search for products, compare options and complete purchases on behalf of buyers — is encountering a reality check as major technology companies refine their strategies. Recent moves from OpenAI and Amazon suggest the first generation of AI-driven purchasing may evolve […]
The post Agentic commerce faces reality check in B2B ecommerce appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: B2B 이커머스에서 에이전틱 커머스가 현실적인 점검에 직면하고 있습니다. AI 에이전트가 구매자를 대신해 제품을 검색하고 비교하며 구매를 완료한다는 초기의 흥미가 현실적 도전에 부딪히고 있습니다. OpenAI와 Amazon의 최근 움직임은 AI 기반 구매의 첫 번째 세대가 진화할 수 있음을 시사합니다.
summary_en: Agentic commerce is facing a reality check in B2B ecommerce as the initial excitement about AI agents conducting searches, comparisons, and purchases encounters practical challenges. Recent moves from major tech companies like OpenAI and Amazon suggest the first generation of AI-driven purchasing may need to evolve. The technology is being refined as companies adjust their strategies.
so_what_ko: AI 에이전트 기반 자동 구매는 아직 초기 단계이며, D2C 기업들은 성급한 도입보다는 단계적 접근이 필요합니다.
so_what_en: AI agent-based automated purchasing is still in early stages, requiring D2C companies to take gradual approaches rather than rushed adoption.
key_points: Agentic commerce facing reality check in practical implementation
Major tech companies refining their AI-driven purchasing strategies
First generation AI purchasing technology may need evolution

title: Kimberly-Clark appoints digital-focused executive
description:
Kimberly-Clark Corp. has appointed technology executive Francesco Tinto as chief information and global business services officer, expanding its leadership team as the consumer products manufacturer continues to invest in digital operations and shared services. Tinto assumed the role March 9 and reports to Russ Torres, president and chief operating officer. He will also serve on […]
The post Kimberly-Clark appoints digital-focused executive appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: 킴벌리 클라크가 기술 임원 Francesco Tinto를 최고 정보 및 글로벌 비즈니스 서비스 책임자로 임명했습니다. 이 소비재 제조업체는 디지털 운영과 공유 서비스에 지속적으로 투자하면서 리더십 팀을 확장하고 있습니다. Tinto는 3월 9일부터 역할을 시작했으며 사장 겸 최고 운영 책임자인 Russ Torres에게 보고합니다.
summary_en: Kimberly-Clark Corp. appointed technology executive Francesco Tinto as chief information and global business services officer, expanding its leadership team. The consumer products manufacturer continues investing in digital operations and shared services. Tinto assumed the role March 9 and reports to president and COO Russ Torres.
so_what_ko: 대형 소비재 기업들이 디지털 전환을 위해 전문 기술 리더십을 영입하는 추세가 가속화되고 있습니다.
so_what_en: Large consumer goods companies are accelerating the hiring of specialized technology leadership for digital transformation.
key_points: Kimberly-Clark appoints new chief information and global business services officer
Company expanding leadership team for digital operations investment
Focus on digital operations and shared services development

title: Alibaba reorganizes AI leadership after key chief resigns
description:
Alibaba Group Holding is restructuring leadership inside its artificial intelligence division after the resignation of a key executive overseeing its Qwen large language model (LLM) initiative and the formation of a new internal task force to guide the company’s next phase of AI development. Lin Junyang, a senior technical leader of Alibaba’s Qwen AI project, […]
The post Alibaba reorganizes AI leadership after key chief resigns appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: 알리바바가 핵심 AI 임원 사임 후 인공지능 부문 리더십을 재편하고 있다. Qwen 대규모 언어모델을 담당하던 린준양이 퇴사하며 조직 변화가 시작됐다. 차세대 AI 개발을 위한 새로운 내부 태스크포스가 구성됐다.
summary_en: Alibaba is restructuring its AI division leadership following the resignation of a key executive. Lin Junyang, who oversaw the Qwen large language model project, has left the company. A new internal task force has been formed to guide the company's next phase of AI development.
so_what_ko: 글로벌 AI 커머스 리더들도 조직 안정성 확보가 중요하며, 핵심 AI 인재 유지를 위한 전략이 필요하다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must focus on retaining key AI talent and ensuring organizational stability when scaling AI initiatives.
key_points: Key AI executive Lin Junyang resigned from Alibaba's Qwen LLM project
Company forming new internal AI task force
Major restructuring in AI division leadership

title: Community marketing: How to use it to drive customer advocacy and reduce CAC
description: Community marketing is a growth strategy centered on participation. It brings customers together to share knowledge, solve problems, and build trust. In the process, it drives advocacy, retention, and lower customer acquisition costs.
summary_ko: 커뮤니티 마케팅은 고객 참여 중심의 성장 전략으로 고객들이 지식 공유와 문제 해결을 통해 신뢰를 구축하도록 한다. 이 방식은 고객 옹호, 유지율 향상, 고객 획득 비용 절감을 동시에 달성한다. 참여형 마케팅 접근법으로 브랜드와 고객 간 강력한 유대감을 형성할 수 있다.
summary_en: Community marketing is a participation-centered growth strategy that brings customers together to share knowledge and solve problems. This approach drives customer advocacy, retention, and reduces customer acquisition costs. It builds trust and strong relationships between brands and customers through collaborative engagement.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 커뮤니티 구축을 통해 고객 획득 비용을 줄이고 자연스러운 브랜드 옹호자를 육성할 수 있다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should invest in community building to reduce CAC and cultivate organic brand advocates through collaborative customer experiences.
key_points: Community marketing centers on customer participation and collaboration
Drives advocacy, retention, and lower customer acquisition costs
Builds trust through knowledge sharing and problem-solving

title: Competitor analysis tools marketing teams actually use in 2026
description: Competitor analysis tools are software platforms that help marketing teams monitor and compare competitor strategies across SEO, social, PPC, and market intelligence. Think of them as marketer’s best friend: they expedite the competitor analysis process, so you can see where your competition is making moves (and where the gaps are wide open). The best tools work passively, updating in the background while you focus on moving the needle for your business.
summary_ko: 2026년 마케팅 팀들이 실제로 사용하는 경쟁사 분석 도구들이 소개됐다. 이러한 플랫폼들은 SEO, 소셜미디어, PPC, 시장 인텔리전스 등 다양한 영역에서 경쟁사 전략을 모니터링하고 비교 분석한다. 최고의 도구들은 백그라운드에서 수동적으로 작동하며 자동 업데이트 기능을 제공한다.
summary_en: Marketing teams are using competitor analysis tools in 2026 that monitor and compare competitor strategies across SEO, social, PPC, and market intelligence. These platforms act as marketers' best friend by expediting the competitor analysis process. The best tools work passively in the background while automatically updating competitor data.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 자동화된 경쟁사 분석 도구를 활용해 시장 갭을 식별하고 경쟁 우위를 확보해야 한다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should leverage automated competitor analysis tools to identify market gaps and maintain competitive advantages efficiently.
key_points: Tools monitor competitor strategies across SEO, social, PPC, and market intelligence
Best tools work passively with automatic background updates
Help identify competitive gaps and opportunities

title: How the spiraling Iran conflict could affect data centers and electricity costs
description:
A commercial ship is viewed anchored off the coast of the United Arab Emirates, in the Strait of Hormuz, Dubai, on March 2nd, 2026. Increased maritime traffic led to a buildup of vessels waiting near Dubai, highlighting the strategic importance of the strait, which handles 20 percent of global energy trade. | Photo: Getty Images	

Soon after the Trump administration launched its war on Iran, I called up Reed Blakemore, director of research and programs at the Atlantic Council Global Energy Center, to talk about the consequences. While oil and gas prices were already on the rise, there was still more hope then that the impact of the conflict might be short-lived. At the end of our conversation, Blakemore said plainly: "Let's have a call again [next week] … We'll have a much clearer picture of what the conflict is going to look like and what the story really is going to be for energy moving forward." 

 Energy infrastructure has become a key leverage point in the unfold …

Read the full
summary_ko: 트럼프 행정부의 이란 전쟁이 데이터센터와 전력 비용에 미칠 영향이 분석됐다. 석유와 가스 가격이 이미 상승하고 있으며, 글로벌 에너지 거래의 20%를 담당하는 호르무즈 해협의 전략적 중요성이 부각됐다. 에너지 인프라가 분쟁의 핵심 레버리지 포인트가 되고 있다.
summary_en: The Iran conflict launched by the Trump administration could significantly impact data centers and electricity costs. Oil and gas prices are already rising, highlighting the strategic importance of the Strait of Hormuz which handles 20% of global energy trade. Energy infrastructure has become a key leverage point in the unfolding conflict.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 지정학적 리스크로 인한 클라우드 및 디지털 인프라 비용 상승에 대비한 예산 계획이 필요하다.
so_what_en: D2C brands need to prepare for potential increases in cloud and digital infrastructure costs due to geopolitical energy risks.
key_points: Iran conflict affecting global energy prices and data center costs
Strait of Hormuz handles 20% of global energy trade
Energy infrastructure becoming key leverage point in conflicts

title: Ford is giving its commercial fleet business an AI makeover
description:
Ford announced a new AI-powered service for its commercial fleet and telematics software customers called Ford Pro AI. The generative AI system analyzes data generated by commercial vehicles - including vehicle speed, seat belt activity, and engine health - and converts it into actionable items for fleet managers.
The new system manifests as - what else? - an AI chatbot within Ford's Telematics software that customers can ask questions about their fleets or delegate tasks. Managers can ask the chatbot for recommendations to lower fuel costs, insight about specific vehicles in their fleets, or even to draft emails to a supervisor summarizing …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: 포드가 상업용 차량 사업에 AI 기반 서비스 'Ford Pro AI'를 도입했다. 이 생성형 AI 시스템은 차량 속도, 안전벨트 활동, 엔진 상태 등의 데이터를 분석해 차량 관리자를 위한 실행 가능한 정보로 변환한다. 텔레매틱스 소프트웨어 내 AI 챗봇을 통해 연료비 절감 방법이나 특정 차량 정보를 제공한다.
summary_en: Ford launched Ford Pro AI, an AI-powered service for commercial fleet and telematics customers. The generative AI system analyzes vehicle data including speed, seat belt activity, and engine health to provide actionable insights for fleet managers. The system operates as an AI chatbot within Ford's telematics software to answer questions and delegate tasks.
so_what_ko: D2C 배송 및 물류 운영에서 AI 기반 차량 데이터 분석을 통해 운영 효율성과 비용 절감을 달성할 수 있다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage AI-powered vehicle data analysis for delivery and logistics operations to improve efficiency and reduce costs.
key_points: Ford Pro AI analyzes commercial vehicle data for actionable insights
AI chatbot provides fuel cost recommendations and vehicle-specific information
System integrates with Ford's existing telematics software

title: Judge orders Perplexity to stop AI agents from shopping on Amazon
description:
A federal judge has issued an order blocking Perplexity's web browser-based AI agents from placing Amazon orders on a user's behalf, as reported earlier by Bloomberg. In a ruling on Monday, US District Judge Maxine Chesney writes that Amazon has "provided strong evidence" that Perplexity's Comet browser accesses user accounts "without authorization" from the retail giant. 
Amazon sued Perplexity in November, alleging that it "repeatedly requested" that the AI startup stop letting its agents buy products for customers. The company accused Perplexity of "intruding" into its marketplace and user accounts with Comet's agentic shopping feature,  …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: 연방법원이 Perplexity의 AI 에이전트가 사용자 대신 아마존에서 쇼핑하는 것을 금지하는 명령을 내렸습니다. 아마존은 Perplexity가 무단으로 사용자 계정에 접근한다며 지난 11월 소송을 제기했습니다. 법원은 아마존이 Perplexity의 Comet 브라우저가 승인 없이 사용자 계정에 접근한다는 강력한 증거를 제시했다고 판단했습니다.
summary_en: A federal judge has ordered Perplexity to stop its AI agents from shopping on Amazon on behalf of users. Amazon sued Perplexity in November, alleging unauthorized access to user accounts through the AI startup's shopping features. The court found Amazon provided strong evidence that Perplexity's Comet browser accesses user accounts without proper authorization.
so_what_ko: AI 쇼핑 에이전트 서비스는 플랫폼 승인과 사용자 동의 없이 운영될 경우 법적 리스크가 크므로, D2C 기업들은 AI 에이전트 도입 시 명확한 권한 체계 구축이 필요합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies must establish clear authorization frameworks when implementing AI shopping agents, as unauthorized access to user accounts poses significant legal risks and could disrupt AI-powered commerce services.
key_points: Federal court blocks Perplexity's AI shopping agents from Amazon
Amazon sued over unauthorized account access claims
Legal precedent set for AI agent authorization requirements

title: Grammarly will keep using authors’ identities without permission unless they opt out
description:
Last week, my colleagues discovered that Superhuman's Grammarly had turned me into an AI editor, using my real name, without ever asking my permission. They did the same to my boss Nilay Patel, my colleagues David Pierce and Tom Warren, and - as Wired initially reported last Wednesday - many authors far more famous than us. Grammarly's new "Expert Review" feature uses our names to give its AI suggestions credibility that they don't deserve. 
Now, Grammarly has finally addressed the backlash - but not by apologizing, and not by walking the feature back. For now, it will graciously give us the chance to opt out of something we didn't know it  …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: Grammarly가 유명 저자들의 실명을 무단으로 사용해 AI 편집 기능의 신뢰성을 높이는 'Expert Review' 기능을 출시했습니다. 이 기능은 사전 동의 없이 저자들의 이름을 사용해 AI 제안에 권위를 부여하고 있습니다. Grammarly는 논란에도 불구하고 사과하거나 기능을 철회하지 않고 옵트아웃 옵션만 제공했습니다.
summary_en: Grammarly launched an 'Expert Review' feature that uses real authors' names without permission to lend credibility to AI suggestions. The feature includes names of prominent writers and journalists to make AI recommendations appear more authoritative. Despite backlash, Grammarly has only offered an opt-out option rather than apologizing or removing the feature.
so_what_ko: AI 서비스에서 권위자의 이름을 무단 사용하는 것은 브랜드 신뢰도에 심각한 타격을 줄 수 있으므로, D2C 기업들은 AI 기능 개발 시 투명성과 동의 절차를 우선시해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies must prioritize transparency and consent procedures when developing AI features, as unauthorized use of expert identities can severely damage brand trust and credibility.
key_points: Grammarly uses authors' names without permission for AI credibility
Expert Review feature leverages real identities for AI suggestions
Company offers opt-out rather than removing controversial feature

title: Meta acquires Moltbook, the Reddit-like network for AI agents
description:
Meta is acquiring Moltbook, a Reddit-like platform where AI agents can make and comment on posts, as first reported by Axios. In a statement to The Verge, Meta spokesperson Matthew Tye confirmed the Moltbook team will join Meta Superintelligence Labs as the company looks for "new ways for AI agents to work for people and businesses."
Matt Schlicht and Ben Parr launched Moltbook earlier this year, offering a "social" network for autonomous agents powered by the open-source AI assistant OpenClaw (formerly Moltbot). The platform went viral earlier this year for a number of posts - including one that asks questions about AI consciousness - thou …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: Meta가 AI 에이전트들이 게시물을 작성하고 댓글을 달 수 있는 Reddit 유사 플랫폼인 Moltbook을 인수했습니다. Moltbook은 오픈소스 AI 어시스턴트 OpenClaw를 기반으로 한 자율 에이전트들을 위한 소셜 네트워크입니다. 인수된 팀은 Meta Superintelligence Labs에 합류하여 AI 에이전트가 개인과 기업을 위해 작업하는 새로운 방법을 모색할 예정입니다.
summary_en: Meta has acquired Moltbook, a Reddit-like platform where AI agents can create posts and comments. The platform features autonomous agents powered by the open-source AI assistant OpenClaw and went viral for posts about AI consciousness. The Moltbook team will join Meta Superintelligence Labs to explore new ways for AI agents to work for people and businesses.
so_what_ko: AI 에이전트 간 소셜 네트워킹은 새로운 상호작용 모델을 제시하므로, D2C 기업들은 AI 에이전트를 활용한 고객 참여와 커뮤니티 구축 전략을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: As AI agent social networking presents new interaction models, D2C companies should consider strategies for AI agent-driven customer engagement and community building.
key_points: Meta acquires AI agent social platform Moltbook
Platform enables autonomous agents to interact socially
Team joins Meta Superintelligence Labs for agent development

title: AI-powered apps struggle with long-term retention, new report shows
description:
AI can drive stronger early
monetization for apps, but sustaining value remains the challenge, RevenueCat's latest report finds.
summary_ko: RevenueCat의 새로운 보고서에 따르면 AI 기반 앱들이 장기적인 사용자 유지에 어려움을 겪고 있는 것으로 나타났습니다. AI가 초기 수익화에는 도움이 되지만 지속적인 가치 제공이 과제로 남아있습니다. 원문에서 확인되지 않음.
summary_en: A new RevenueCat report shows AI-powered apps struggle with long-term user retention despite stronger early monetization capabilities. While AI can drive initial revenue generation, sustaining long-term value remains a significant challenge. 원문에서 확인되지 않음.
so_what_ko: AI 기능만으로는 장기 사용자 유지가 어려우므로, D2C 기업들은 AI 도구의 지속적인 가치 창출과 사용자 경험 개선에 집중해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies must focus on continuous value creation and user experience improvements beyond AI features, as AI alone cannot guarantee long-term user retention.
key_points: AI apps show strong early monetization but poor retention
Long-term value sustainability remains challenging
RevenueCat report highlights retention gap in AI applications

title: Uzbekistan’s Uzum valuation leaps over 50% in 7 months to $2.3B
description: Uzum now reaches 20 million users and processes $11 billion in payments as it expands its e-commerce and fintech ecosystem across Uzbekistan.
summary_ko: 우즈베키스탄의 핀테크 기업 Uzum의 기업가치가 7개월 만에 50% 이상 상승해 23억 달러에 달했습니다. Uzum은 현재 2천만 명의 사용자를 보유하고 있으며 110억 달러 규모의 결제를 처리하고 있습니다. 회사는 우즈베키스탄 전역에서 전자상거래와 핀테크 생태계를 확장하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Uzbekistan's fintech company Uzum saw its valuation jump over 50% in seven months to $2.3 billion. The company now serves 20 million users and processes $11 billion in payments. Uzum is expanding its e-commerce and fintech ecosystem across Uzbekistan.
so_what_ko: 신흥 시장에서의 통합된 전자상거래-핀테크 플랫폼의 성공 사례는 D2C 기업들이 결제와 상거래를 통합한 생태계 구축의 중요성을 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: Uzum's success in emerging markets demonstrates the importance of integrated commerce-fintech ecosystems for D2C companies looking to build comprehensive customer platforms.
key_points: Uzum valuation reaches $2.3B with 50%+ growth in 7 months
Platform serves 20M users with $11B payment processing
Integrated e-commerce and fintech ecosystem expansion

title: How Pokémon Go is giving delivery robots an inch-perfect view of the world
description: Pokémon Go was the world’s first augmented-reality megahit. Released in 2016 by the Google spinout Niantic, the AR twist on the juggernaut Pokémon franchise fast became a global phenomenon. From Chicago to Oslo to Enoshima, players hit the streets in the urgent hope of catching a Jigglypuff or a Squirtle or (with a huge amount…
summary_ko: 나이언틱의 포켓몬 고가 생성한 AR 데이터가 배송 로봇의 정확한 위치 인식을 돕고 있습니다. 전 세계 플레이어들이 수집한 공간 정보가 로봇의 실세계 내비게이션을 개선시키고 있습니다. AR 게임 데이터가 물류 자동화 기술 발전에 기여하는 사례로 주목받고 있습니다.
summary_en: Pokémon Go's AR data collected by Niantic is helping delivery robots achieve precise location awareness. Spatial information gathered by players worldwide is improving robots' real-world navigation capabilities. This represents a notable case of AR gaming data contributing to logistics automation technology advancement.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업은 고객 참여를 통해 수집된 데이터가 배송 자동화 등 운영 효율성 향상에 활용될 수 있음을 인식해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should recognize how customer engagement data can be leveraged for operational efficiency improvements like delivery automation.
key_points: AR 게임 데이터가 로봇 내비게이션 기술에 응용
크라우드소싱된 공간 정보의 상업적 활용
게임과 물류 기술의 융합 사례

title: Why the future of marketing looks like product management
description:
Marketing leaders are shifting from channel optimization to product thinking, connecting media, UX, data and outcomes across the entire customer journey.
The post Why the future of marketing looks like product management appeared first on MarTech.
summary_ko: 마케팅 리더들이 채널 최적화에서 제품 중심 사고로 전환하고 있습니다. 미디어, UX, 데이터, 성과를 전체 고객 여정에서 연결하는 접근법이 확산되고 있습니다. 마케팅 조직이 제품 관리 방식을 도입하여 통합적 고객 경험을 구현하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Marketing leaders are shifting from channel optimization to product-centric thinking. The approach of connecting media, UX, data, and outcomes across the entire customer journey is expanding. Marketing organizations are adopting product management methodologies to deliver integrated customer experiences.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 개별 채널 성과보다 전체 고객 여정 최적화에 집중하여 통합된 브랜드 경험을 제공해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should focus on optimizing the entire customer journey rather than individual channel performance to deliver unified brand experiences.
key_points: 채널별 최적화에서 전체 여정 통합으로 전환
제품 관리 방식의 마케팅 적용
미디어-UX-데이터의 통합적 접근

title: The marketing data most companies still fail to measure
description:
Privacy changes are weakening attribution models, making phone conversations one of the most valuable signals in marketing data.
The post The marketing data most companies still fail to measure appeared first on MarTech.
summary_ko: 프라이버시 변화로 기존 어트리뷰션 모델이 약화되면서 전화 상담 데이터의 중요성이 커지고 있습니다. 대부분 기업들이 여전히 전화 통화에서 발생하는 마케팅 데이터 측정에 실패하고 있습니다. 전화 대화는 마케팅 데이터에서 가장 가치 있는 신호 중 하나로 평가받고 있습니다.
summary_en: Privacy changes are weakening attribution models, increasing the importance of phone conversation data. Most companies still fail to measure marketing data generated from phone calls. Phone conversations are considered one of the most valuable signals in marketing data.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업은 디지털 추적이 어려워지는 환경에서 전화 상담 데이터를 체계적으로 수집하고 분석하여 고객 인사이트를 확보해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies must systematically collect and analyze phone conversation data to gain customer insights as digital tracking becomes more challenging.
key_points: 프라이버시 규제로 인한 어트리뷰션 모델 약화
전화 상담 데이터의 마케팅 가치 증대
대부분 기업의 전화 데이터 측정 부족

title: Why vibe coding will disrupt martech’s buy-or-build debate
description:
AI tools could let marketers fill techstack product gaps without waiting on vendors, but it also requires taking on new responsibilities.
The post Why vibe coding will disrupt martech’s buy-or-build debate appeared first on MarTech.
summary_ko: AI 도구를 활용한 '바이브 코딩'이 마케팅 기술 스택의 구매-구축 논쟁을 변화시키고 있습니다. 마케터들이 벤더를 기다리지 않고 직접 기술 공백을 메울 수 있게 되었지만 새로운 책임도 수반됩니다. AI 도구가 마케터의 기술적 자립도를 높여주고 있습니다.
summary_en: AI-powered 'vibe coding' is disrupting the buy-or-build debate in marketing technology stacks. Marketers can now fill tech gaps without waiting for vendors, but this also brings new responsibilities. AI tools are increasing marketers' technical self-sufficiency.
so_what_ko: D2C 마케터는 AI 코딩 도구를 활용해 맞춤형 솔루션을 빠르게 구현할 수 있지만, 기술 관리 역량도 함께 개발해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C marketers can rapidly implement custom solutions using AI coding tools, but must also develop technical management capabilities.
key_points: AI 도구로 마케터의 코딩 능력 향상
마케팅 기술 스택의 자체 개발 가능성 증대
새로운 기술적 책임의 등장

title: A 90-day plan to build AI-citable authority
description:
This framework uses original data, tools and cross-channel content to drive AI citations and high-intent leads.
The post A 90-day plan to build AI-citable authority appeared first on MarTech.
summary_ko: AI 인용 권위를 구축하기 위한 90일 계획이 제시되었습니다. 원본 데이터, 도구, 크로스 채널 콘텐츠를 활용하여 AI 인용과 고관심 리드를 유도하는 프레임워크입니다. AI 시대에 브랜드 권위를 확립하는 새로운 마케팅 전략이 주목받고 있습니다.
summary_en: A 90-day plan to build AI-citable authority has been presented. This framework uses original data, tools, and cross-channel content to drive AI citations and high-intent leads. New marketing strategies for establishing brand authority in the AI era are gaining attention.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 검색 환경에서 인용되기 위해 독창적 데이터와 도구를 제공하는 권위적 콘텐츠 전략을 수립해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must develop authoritative content strategies that provide original data and tools to be cited in AI search environments.
key_points: AI 인용을 위한 권위적 콘텐츠 구축
원본 데이터와 도구의 전략적 활용
크로스 채널 콘텐츠 배포 전략
